news.summary: Enhanced Hole Insights is introducing enhanced analysis for each hole on the course, providing extensive information on historical, in-Tournament, and projected play. The updates include AI Narration available in both English and Spanish. The new features can be accessed through the revamped Masters Tournament app on Apple Vision Pro. The enhancements aim to provide a more detailed and immersive experience for users, aiming to improve their understanding of the game. These updates come as IBM continues to innovate in the golfing technology space.
news.headline: IBM introduces WatsonX AI features for 2025 Masters Tournament: Enhanced Hole Insights, AI Narration in English & Spanish, revamped app.

news.summary: A leading cryptocurrency analytics company has brought attention to the rising popularity of XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) among retail investors, in contrast to Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) rally which is driven more by institutional investors. Glassnode highlighted a notable divergence in the rally paths of XRP and Bitcoin. Since hitting the low point of the 2022 cycle, XRP has witnessed a remarkable 490% surge in active addresses, while Bitcoin has only seen a modest 10% increase. This significant increase in active addresses for XRP indicates a pronounced retail interest in the digital asset. Despite both cryptocurrencies experiencing similar price gains of around 5 to 6 times since the 2022 cycle low, the trajectories of XRP and Bitcoin have been notably different. Bitcoin has displayed steady growth driven by catalysts, whereas XRP remained relatively stagnant until a breakout in December, fueled by short-term retail speculation. This information is available in full on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: XRP gaining retail traction, surpasses BTC in active addresses. Since 2022 cycle low, XRP up 490%, BTC just 10%.

news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Shell Midstream Operating LLC, a subsidiary of Shell plc, announced the sale of its 16.125% stake in Colonial Enterprises, Inc. to Colossus AcquireCo LLC, a subsidiary of Brookfield Infrastructure Partners L. The deal involves a significant ownership transfer in Colonial Enterprises, Inc. and is a strategic move by Shell Midstream Operating LLC.
news.headline: Shell's subsidiary to sell 16.125% stake in Colonial Enterprises Inc. to Brookfield, a significant move in energy sector.

news.summary: A recent development in Singapore has seen a team of researchers utilizing artificial intelligence to streamline the optimization of bioprinting parameters for oral soft tissue grafts. This advancement has resulted in a reduction in time and resource demands, ultimately enabling more efficient and personalized dental treatments. The breakthrough, announced on April 4, 2025, marks a significant milestone in the field of bioprinting. This innovative approach aims to improve the process of creating oral soft tissue grafts and has the potential to revolutionize the dental industry. The use of AI has led to faster and more effective treatment options, benefitting both patients and practitioners. This development showcases the power of technology in enhancing healthcare and highlights the importance of continuous innovation in the medical field.
news.headline: NUS researchers use AI to enhance 3D bioprinting for oral tissue grafts, making dental treatments more efficient.

news.summary: Bunker Hill Mining Corp., headquartered in Kellogg, Idaho and Vancouver, British Columbia, recently made an announcement on April 3, 2025, declaring their decision to issue a total of 187,500 common shares ("Interest Shares") to specific holders of 7.5% convertible debentures, known as the "Series 1 Convertible Debentures," in lieu of the interest owed as of March 31, 2025. This interest payment amounts to US$18,750. The Series 1 Convertible Debentures are set to reach maturity on March 31, 2028. The company's stock is traded on the TSXV under the symbol "BNKR" and on the OTCQB under the symbol "BHLL."
news.headline: Bunker Hill issues 187,500 Common Shares to holders of 7.5% convertible debentures to settle $18,750 interest payment.

news.summary: Global markets lost $2 trillion in value after President Donald Trump implemented reciprocal tariffs, prompting billionaire investor Bill Ackman to advise foreign leaders to reach out to Trump immediately. Ackman highlighted Trump's dealmaking mindset and described financial markets experiencing their worst sell-off since the COVID-19 pandemic. During this rout, Apple Inc. dropped by 9.25%, NVIDIA Corp. by 7.81%, and Amazon.com Inc. by 8.98%. Ackman stressed Trump's negotiation tactics and encouraged leaders to engage with him. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Ackman advises foreign leaders to reach out to Trump to avoid financial losses; global markets lost $2 trillion.

news.summary: A Singapore-based AI firm, Genius Group, has been temporarily barred from expanding its Bitcoin treasury due to a US court order preventing it from selling shares, raising funds, and using investor money to acquire more Bitcoin. The court issued a preliminary injunction and temporary restraining order on March 13, linked to a dispute stemming from a merger with Fatbrain AI. Genius Group halted marketing activities, closed divisions, and sold 10 Bitcoin worth $23 million to finance operations, with the possibility of further sales in the future. Fatbrain AI executives filed for the injunction, alleging fraud, while two lawsuits claimed $30 million fraud during the merger. The company expressed concerns over US court actions contradicting Singapore law, particularly regarding share compensation. Despite the legal obstacles, Genius Group remains committed to promoting Bitcoin, having previously outlined plans to allocate a significant portion of reserves to Bitcoin. The firm's stock price has declined significantly, with shares losing over 99% of their value since reaching an all-time high in 2022.
news.headline: Genius Group barred from buying Bitcoin, sells 10 BTC worth over $23M to fund operations amid US court order. Stock price down 9.80%, further drop after bell. CEO plans to minimize Bitcoin sales despite injunction. Source of internal disputes results in merger termination.

news.summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq experienced their most significant declines since 2020 as President Trump mentioned that his tariff strategy is progressing positively. The market saw a substantial drop influenced by Trump's tariff plan. Dow Jones Futures indicate that investors are awaiting the imminent jobs report and statements from Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell. The market's performance on this day was affected by various factors, including the current administration's tariff actions and anticipation for upcoming economic indicators such as job data and Powell's announcements.
news.headline: Dow Jones Futures dip after Trump tariffs led to market's worst day since 2020. S&P 500/Nasdaq slump. Fed chief Powell's update awaited.

news.summary: The state is set to be the fourth to resolve its legal actions against the crypto exchange, with six other cases still pending.
news.headline: Illinois drops lawsuit against Coinbase over staking program, becoming fourth state to do so. Six cases still pending.

The report delves into current market patterns, key industry players, and the significant role these modifiers play in fostering expansion across various sectors worldwide." On April 4, 2025, in Boston, the report states that...
news.headline: Impact modifiers market expected to grow at a 5.7% CAGR, driven by demand in plastics and polymers; global markets report covers trends and major companies.

news.summary: Former Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao, known as CZ, has signed a memorandum of understanding with Kyrgyz Republic’s foreign investment agency to advise on blockchain and crypto regulation. He will provide technical expertise and consulting services for the country, aiming to strengthen its technological infrastructure and prepare specialists in blockchain and cybersecurity. Kyrgyzstan, rich in renewable energy, is seen as ideal for crypto mining, with over 30% energy supplied by hydroelectric power. CZ has also advised Malaysia and met officials in the UAE and Bhutan. Since his release from a US prison, he has invested in various tech companies and donated 1,000 BNB (worth nearly $600,000) towards earthquake relief in Thailand and Myanmar.
news.headline: Binance co-founder CZ to provide blockchain advice for Kyrgyzstan, supporting gov efficiency and regulation. Collaboration focuses on strengthening tech infrastructure and preparing specialists in blockchain, virtual asset management, and cybersecurity. CZ also met with Malaysia, UAE, and Bhutan officials. Kyrgyzstan, a suitable place for crypto mining, utilizes only 10% of potential hydropower. CZ, after prison release, invested in AI and biotech, and donated 1,000 BNB for earthquake relief.

news.summary: In an interview with former BLS Commissioner Erica Groshen, Shift discussed the implications of disbanding two advisory groups on the country's job data. The removal of these groups could impact the accuracy and reliability of key employment figures, such as the unemployment rate and job growth numbers. Groshen emphasized the importance of expert input in maintaining the integrity of labor statistics, highlighting concerns over potential data disruptions due to the advisory groups' dissolution. This development raises questions about the future transparency and quality of job-related information available to policymakers and the public.
news.headline: Former BLS Commissioner Erica Groshen expresses concern over the removal of two advisory committees on job data.

news.summary: The enhanced version of ChatGPT is now available at no cost for students enrolled at accredited colleges and universities in the United States and Canada.
news.headline: Free ChatGPT for millions of North American college students at accredited U.S. and Canadian schools.

news.summary: Cryptocurrency bettors have significantly increased the likelihood of a U.S. recession following President Donald Trump's underwhelming "Liberation Day" tariff implementation. The odds for the betting contract "US recession in 2025?" surged from 46% to 54% in the past 24 hours on Polymarket, indicating a noteworthy shift compared to the 38% probability just a week ago. The wagers on this outcome have surpassed $1 million on the Polygon-based platform for predictions. The market will be resolved affirmatively if the National Bureau of Economic Research confirms a U.S. recession before January. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Cryptocurrency bettors raised odds of U.S. recession in 2025 to 54% after Trump's tariff rollout. Over $1 million bet, up from 38% a week ago.

news.summary: Brookfield Infrastructure Partners L.P. and its institutional partners have made a significant move by sealing a firm deal to purchase the renowned midstream asset portfolio of Colonial Enterprises, which encompasses the famed Colonial Pipeline. This acquisition comes with a hefty price tag of about $9 billion, translating to approximately 9 times the EBITDA value. Colonial boasts the title of the most extensive refined products system in the U.S., with a sprawling network covering roughly 5,500 miles from Texas to New York. Over the years, Colonial has demonstrated robust performance and exceptional utilization, catering to a top-tier customer base across the U.S. East Coast.
news.headline: Brookfield Infrastructure acquires Colonial Enterprises, including Colonial Pipeline, for $9B, spanning 5,500 miles in the US.

news.summary: Lianhe Sowell International Group Ltd, trading under the ticker symbol LHSW on the NASDAQ, completed its initial public offering on April 3, 2025.
news.headline: Lianhe Sowell (NASDAQ: LHSW) debuts on Nasdaq on April 3, 2025, aiming for business growth and industry revolution.
